name: rp2040_s3jtag_full
description: Rule-B full pack for RP2040 via S3JTAG. This convenience layer preserves each test plan's own board profile so the SWD/TARGETIN and SWD/UART paths can coexist without forcing a single pack-level board.
notes: Rule-D convenience layer built on already validated independent tests. Pack-level board is intentionally omitted so each test keeps its own board profile.
